publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

msItem.title: Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension)
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), Sene
Sǝnkǝssār (Second revision, Dabra Libānos recension), No item: chapter: SanIntroduction
msItem.incipit: በስመ፡ ወርኃ፡ ሰኔ፡ ቡሩክ፡ መዓልቱ፡ ፲ወ፭ ሰዓት፡ ወእምዝ፡ የሐፅፅ፡

msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ወርኃ፡ ስኔ፡ ቡሩክ፡ ወስብሐት፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ወላዕሌነ፡ ይኩን፡ ሣህል፡ ወምሕረት፡ እስከ፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፡

msItem.incipit:
በስመ፡
ወርኃ፡ ሐምሌ፡ ቡሩክ፡ መዓልቱ፡ ፲ወ፪ ሰዓት፡ ወእምዝ፡ የሐፅፅ፡

msItem.explicit: ተፈጸመ፡ ምንባብ፡ ዘወርኃ፡ ሐምሌ፡ ሣህሉ፡ ወምሕረቱ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር፡ ይኅድር፡ ላዕሌነ፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፡ ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን፡

Za-ʾaqrabku māḫleta

msItem.colophon: ለዛቲ፡ መጽሐፍ፡ ስንክሳር፡ ዜና፡ መላእክት፡ ትጉሃን። ወተዝካረ፡ ነቢያት፡ ቅዱሳን። ወስብከተ፡ ሐዋርያት፡ ፍጹማን። ወገድለ፡ ሰማዕታት፡ መዋዕያን፡ ወተዝካረ፡ ኵሎሙ፡ ጻድቃን፡ ጸሐፍክዋ፡ አነ፡ በትረ፡ ሚካኤል፡፡ እንዘ፡ እሴፎ፡ ረድኤተ፡ እምኀበ፡ እግዚአብሔር፡ ዘመሐለ፡ ሎሙ፡ እንዘ፡ ይብል፡ ለዘጸሐፈ፡ ስምዓ፡ ገድሎሙ፡ ወለዘይገብር፡ ተዝካሮሙ፡ አነ፡ እደመስስ፡ ኀጣውኢሁ፡ ወአስተዋርሶ፡ መንግሥትየ፡ ምስሌሆሙ። በዝዓለም፡ ከመ፡ ይኩነኒ ተዝካረ፡ ወበዘይመጽእ፡ ዓለም፡ ለዓለመ፡ ዓለም፡ አሜን፡ ወአሜን፡ ለይኩን፡ ለይኩን፡

collation.signatures: Regular quire marks (decorated Ethiopic numerals) in the upper left corner of the first folio of each quire, beginning with ፲ and going until ፲፱.

supportDesc.condition: The manuscript shows slight traces of use. Occasional parchment repairs throughout.

item.desc: The lacunae left for the names of the owner and scribes have been left unfilled in the entire codex.
Ex libris of James Bruce glued on the inner front board, containing shelfmarks of the manuscript: 85. Aeth. Cat. 4. Bruce of Kinnaird Nº 9
A pagemark of blue textile is sewn to the headband.

binding.decoNote: European binding, red leather with gilded borders. Imprinted on the spine: Synaxar. Tom IV. Cover of the inner board and first fly-leaf gilded paper with geometrical pattern. The text block has been trimmed and its egdes been gilded. The manuscript is very tightly bound. One paper fly leaf at the front, on which a watermark is visible. One paper fly leaf at the back, made of thicker paper. One guard leaf each at the front and back made of a different, probably European parchment.

bibl.title: Catalogus codicum manuscriptorum Bibliothecae Bodleianae Oxoniensis, Pars VII: Codices Aethiopici

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Updated with codicological information (collation, foliation, condition, extras) during consultation of the manuscript.
Improved binding description according to proposition by Denis Nosnitsin.
